_comment: Auto-generated by tools/build.mjs. Do not hand-edit. Run `npm run build`.

drafts.title: Oven Hash Browns: The Sheet-Pan Slab
drafts.lede: One sheet-pan slab, shatter-crisp on both faces, tender inside — for a crew of ten to twelve. The trick is water: rinse, salt, squeeze bone-dry, then a hot preheated pan does the rest. Interactive: scale it, tick it, cook it.

drafts.title: Koji: The Mould That Cooks For You
drafts.lede: One microbe turns rice into sweetness, protein into umami, and a tough cut into something tender — before a flame is ever lit. Meet the fungus Japan made its national organism.

drafts.title: Focaccia: The Science-First Version
drafts.lede: 80% hydration, a 24–72h cold ferment, and a salamoia brine in the dimples. The open, custardy crumb and crisp-tender Ligurian crust — made reliable. Interactive: scale it, tick it, cook it.

drafts.title: Pita Bread: The Science-First Version
drafts.lede: 64% hydration, a screaming-hot surface, and a relaxed rest after rolling. The steam-leavened pocket made reliable — on a stone or a galley skillet. Twenty pitas for ten to twelve. Interactive: scale it, tick it, cook it.

drafts.title: The Crew Quiche: The Science-First Version
drafts.lede: The appareil ratio that sets silky yet sliceable, a blind-baked sealed shell, and a low gentle bake pulled at a jiggle. A crew quiche for ten in a half gastronorm. Interactive: scale it, tick it, cook it.
